title: Task Record
description: One line in data/tasks/active.jsonl. Tracks tasks created manually or from triage suggestions.

id.description: Unique task ID in format task-YYYY-MM-DD-NNN

ts.description: ISO 8601 timestamp with timezone offset when task was created

source_email.description: Gmail message ID if task originated from an email

outcome.description: Summary of task result when completed

completed_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when task was completed

task_type.description: Type of task, determines analysis approach. Null for legacy tasks created before this field existed.

output_dir.description: Path to task output directory (e.g., data/tasks/task-2026-03-23-001/). Null until task execution begins.

source_triage.description: Triage file path if task originated from triage (e.g., data/triage/2026-03-23T004602.jsonl). Null for manual tasks.

client_name.description: Associated client name if task is client-related. Populated from triage record or client lookup.

draft_id.description: Gmail draft ID if a draft was created on task completion. Null if task was not email-triggered.
